title: What's the naming rule of internal signals (wire/reg) about verilog RTL design --> SystemC?
body:
Q: Everybody knows that Verilator will convert the verilog RTL designs into SystemC files in obj_dir folder. I need to dump some specific signals (reg/wire) in my VCD waveform. I can find all internal signals in obj_dir/Vdut_top_xxxxxxroot.h header file.
 
ie.,   dut_top.dut1.dut2.dout   will be converted into dut_top__DOT__dut1__DOT__dut2__DOT__dout    
Thus, I can dump only this dout internal signal in my VCD waveform to speed up my simulation. 

But there are many other verilog coding style, such as generated, function, task.....

    What's (does it exist) the regular naming rule of internal signals (wire/reg) in this converted SystemC TOP header file when the verilog RTL design is converted into SystemC?
